Company

Role Overview

Position: Product Evangelist - Customer Experience & Growth Closing Date: 23, July 2026 Published: 14, July 2026 Contact: recruitment@sequoiaat.com

Experience: Freshers welcome! (0–1 year experience) Role Type: Full-time, customer-facing

Why This Role is Different

Most entry-level jobs bury you in tickets and targets. This one doesn’t. You’ll be the face and voice of Offrd — an AI-powered HR platform used by hundreds of Indian businesses. Your job is simple: talk to customers, show them what our product can do, help them succeed, and build relationships that last.

What You’ll Actually Do

  • Be the voice of Offrd — run product demos on Zoom/Meet, welcome new customers, and make them feel at home.
  • Chat, call, connect — answer customer questions over calls and chat, and turn confused users into happy fans.
  • Show off the good stuff — introduce customers to premium features and help them see the value in upgrading.
  • Network like a pro — build genuine relationships with HR and business owners across India.
  • Be the customer's champion — pass feedback to the product team and help shape what we build next.

Who We’re Looking For

  • A natural people person — you genuinely enjoy conversations, not just tolerate them.
  • Excellent communicator — fluent, confident spoken English (Hindi is a big plus for our North Indian customers).
  • Dynamic and self-driven — you don’t wait to be told; you spot opportunities and go after them.
  • Product-passionate — you love exploring apps, understanding how they work, and explaining them simply.
  • Calm under pressure — when a customer reports a problem, you solve it with a smile, not a panic.
  • Fresher or up to 1 year of experience — in customer success, sales, support, demos, or anything people-facing. Attitude matters more than your resume.

One Honest Thing

Our customers are business owners and HR teams — and they sometimes need us in the evenings or on weekends. So this role needs someone happy to take a call or reply to a chat outside 9-to-6 hours. In return, the overall workload is genuinely light, and we're flexible with you too. If you see "always reachable, rarely overloaded" as a fair trade, we'll get along great.

What’s In It For You

  • Fast-track learning: Work directly with the founder and core team of a growing SaaS startup.
  • Real ownership: Your customers, your relationships, your wins.
  • A career springboard: This role grows into customer success leadership, product, or growth roles.
  • A product people actually use: See your work make a difference for real businesses every single day.

Preferred Skills

Sound like you? Don’t overthink the application. Send us your resume with 2–3 lines on why you love talking to people that tells us more than any certificate.
summary: Entry-level Product Evangelist role at Offrd, focusing on customer engagement, product demos, and relationship-building. Ideal for freshers with strong communication and product passion.

  • Achieve sales targets through new customer acquisition.
  • Identify upselling and cross-selling opportunities within existing accounts.
  • Negotiate contracts, handle customer objections, and close deals.
  • Build and maintain strong customer relationships throughout the sales journey.
  • Maintain accurate CRM records, sales pipeline, and forecasts.
  • Partner with Onboarding and Customer Success teams to ensure a seamless customer handover.

Preferred Skills & Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, Commerce, or a related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of experience in SaaS Sales, B2B Sales, Account Management, Inside Sales, or Business Development.
  • Proven experience in sales negotiations, proposal management, and deal closures.
  • Proficiency with CRM platforms such as HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho CRM, or equivalent.
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and closing skills.
  • Strong consultative selling and relationship management abilities.
  • Experience with pipeline management and sales forecasting.
  • Customer-focused, target-driven, and results-oriented mindset.
  • Experience selling SaaS solutions (CRM, ERP, or business software) is preferred.
  • Exposure to SMB, Mid-Market, or Enterprise sales is an advantage.
  • Understanding of SaaS subscription and recurring revenue models is preferred.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Revenue generated
  • Deals closed
  • Opportunity-to-customer conversion rate
  • Average deal value
  • Sales target achievement
  • Customer retention and account growth

Application Process

Interested candidates should send their resume and a brief cover letter to career@ibosoninnov.com.
